task: READ-ONLY post-implementation review. The requested behavior is: every Quickshell central overlay except workspaces renders only on the monitor that activated it; pairwise transitions clean state correctly; tall→short content stays top-aligned; Wi-Fi deferred scans cannot resurrect after close; Bluetooth native actions continue coherently while hidden. Inspect current diffs in Bar.qml, StatusData.qml, VolumeIndicator.qml, BrightnessIndicator.qml, and DESIGN_GUIDE.md. Check all activation paths (IPC keyboard and per-monitor clicks/wheels), target switching, keyboard focus, timers/races, and QML binding correctness. Do not edit. Report only concrete blockers/medium findings with file:line references, or say clean.

criteria.must: Return concrete findings with file paths and severity when applicable
Return concrete findings with file paths and severity when applicable

criteriaSatisfied.evidence: Two medium-severity target-switching defects are identified with exact StatusData.qml line references and observable state consequences.

commandsRun.summary: Inspected the complete scoped implementation diff.
Checked IPC, per-monitor click/wheel, cleanup, timer, and deferred-callback paths.

validationOutput: Per-monitor rendering predicates and keyboard-focus predicates are correctly target-bound in Bar.qml.
Tall overlay children are top-anchored, so tall-to-short transitions remain top-aligned.
Wi-Fi scan generation prevents deferred Qt.callLater callbacks from resurrecting scanning after close.
Bluetooth native action device and action timer survive selector hiding.
residualRisks: Runtime multi-monitor focus transfer and timing were not manually exercised in a live Quickshell session.
childReport.diffSummary: Introduces monitor-targeted central overlays, centralized cleanup helpers, top-aligned overlay content, Wi-Fi scan generations, and preservation of hidden Bluetooth native actions.
reviewFindings: medium: StatusData.qml:602-633 - Wi-Fi target transfer resets visible selection while retaining password and pending-connection state.
medium: StatusData.qml:704-755 - Bluetooth target transfer resets to the paired tab without stopping an existing Nearby discovery scan.
childReport.manualNotes: Read-only review; no files were edited.
